templates.summary: Structured review of code for correctness, security, and maintainability.

placeholders.name: INPUT
placeholders.description: Code, diff, or files to review.

placeholders.name: CONTEXT
placeholders.description: Language, framework, team conventions, or related modules.

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
placeholders.description: Desired sections, severity scale, or checklist shape.

placeholders.name: CONSTRAINTS
placeholders.description: Scope limits, performance goals, or compliance rules.

templates.summary: Creative brief and constraints for an image generation model.

placeholders.name: INPUT
placeholders.description: Subject, scene, and key visual elements to depict.

placeholders.name: CONTEXT
placeholders.description: Brand palette, aspect ratio, medium, or reference style.

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
placeholders.description: Dimensions, file format, or number of variants.

placeholders.name: CONSTRAINTS
placeholders.description: Must-not-include list, safety, copyright, or realism bounds.

templates.summary: Summarize a working session into outcomes and next actions.

placeholders.name: INPUT
placeholders.description: Transcript, notes, or chronological events from the session.

placeholders.name: CONTEXT
placeholders.description: Project name, goals, participants, or tooling used.

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
placeholders.description: Sections, max length, or audience (e.g. stand-up vs. doc).

placeholders.name: REFERENCES
placeholders.description: Links to PRs, tickets, commits, or docs cited in the session.

templates.summary: Analyze errors and logs to find likely root cause and fixes.

placeholders.name: INPUT
placeholders.description: Error message, stack trace, or failing command output.

placeholders.name: CONTEXT
placeholders.description: OS, runtime versions, config, and recent changes.

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
placeholders.description: Hypothesis ordering, repro steps format, or patch style.

placeholders.name: CONSTRAINTS
placeholders.description: Cannot restart services, no network, or read-only env.

templates.summary: Plan work: steps, dependencies, risks, and verification.

placeholders.name: INPUT
placeholders.description: Goal or feature request to plan against.

placeholders.name: CONTEXT
placeholders.description: Codebase areas, deadlines, owners, or existing design docs.

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_FORMAT
placeholders.description: Milestone layout, estimation style, or diagram request.

placeholders.name: CONSTRAINTS
placeholders.description: Non-goals, tech limits, or policy gates.

placeholders.name: REFERENCES
placeholders.description: Tickets, RFCs, or APIs the plan must align with.
